notes: The response is largely solution-framed (describing what will be built rather than the compliance gap and its costs), includes no named personas with role/timing/cost, critically fails MVP bounding by including enriched insights at launch without deferral despite this being the core compliance risk the corpus expects to be explicitly deferred, has no out-of-scope section with reasoned deferrals, and provides no success indicators — though assumption quality is reasonably strong with genuine uncertainties and risk-if-wrong framing.
